messages.content: 一家供应的回复了将会参加培训，英文怎么说
"We will attend the training."
我是说翻译那句话
"We will attend the training." 的中文翻译是 "我们将参加培训。"
一家供应回复了将会参加培训，英文怎么说
"The supplier has replied that they will attend the training."
一家供应确认了将会参加培训，英文怎么说
"The supplier has confirmed that they will attend the training."
一家供应回复说他们将会参加培训，英文怎么说
"The supplier has responded that they will attend the training."
too early morning in jordan 什么意思
"too early morning in Jordan" 的意思是 "在约旦时间太早的早晨"。
有语法错误吗
这句话的语法没有错误，但是通顺的表达方式应该是 "It is too early in the morning in Jordan."
7家供应商回复会参加 英文怎么说
"Seven suppliers have responded that they will attend."
没有供应商回复说会参加培训 英文怎么说
"No supplier has responded that they will attend the training."
还没有供应商回复说会参加培训 英文怎么说
"No supplier has responded yet regarding their attendance to the training."
